description.italian: Respingi tutte e quattro le ondate.

description.danish: Start demoen og affyr dit skib.
description.dutch: Start de demo en lanceer je schip.
description.english: Start the Demo and launch your ship.
description.french: Lance la démo et décolle ton vaisseau.
description.german: Starte das Demo und starte dein Schiff.
description.greek: Ξεκίνα το demo και εκτόξευσε το σκάφος σου.
description.italian: Avvia la demo e lancia la tua nave.
description.polish: Uruchom demo i wystartuj swój statek.
description.portuguese: Inicia a demo e lança tua nave.
description.russian: Запусти демо и подними свой корабль.
description.spanish: Inicia la demo y lanza tu nave.

description.dutch: Bekijk de aftiteling en eer de makers!
description.english: Watch the Credits and honor the creators!
description.french: Regarde le générique et rends hommage aux créateurs !
description.german: Schau dir den Abspann bis zum Ende an und würdige das Team.
description.greek: Δες τα credits και τίμησε τους δημιουργούς!
description.italian: Guarda i crediti e onora i creatori!
description.polish: Obejrzyj napisy końcowe i oddaj cześć twórcom!
description.portuguese: Assiste aos créditos e honra os criadores!
description.spanish: Mira los créditos y honra a los creadores.

description.dutch: Accepteer de missie en red de aarde.
description.english: Accept the Mission and save the Earth.
description.french: Accepte la mission et sauve la Terre.
description.german: Nimm die Mission an und rette die Erde.
description.greek: Αποδέξου την αποστολή και σώσε τη Γη.
description.italian: Accetta la missione e salva la Terra.
description.portuguese: Aceita a missão e salva a Terra.
description.spanish: Acepta la misión y salva la Tierra.
description.turkish: Misyonda yer al ve Dünyayı kurtar.

description.danish: Afvis missionen og overlad Jorden til sin skæbne.
description.dutch: Weiger de missie en laat de aarde aan haar lot over.
description.english: Refuse the mission and leave Earth to its fate.
description.french: Refuse la mission et laisse la Terre à son destin.
description.german: Lehne die Mission ab und überlasse die Erde ihrem Schicksal.
description.greek: Αρνήσου την αποστολή και άφησε τη Γη στη μοίρα της.
description.italian: Rifiuta la missione e lascia la Terra al suo destino.
description.polish: Odrzuć misję i pozostaw Ziemię jej losowi.
description.portuguese: Recusa a missão e deixa a Terra ao seu destino.
description.russian: Откажись от миссии и оставь Землю её судьбе.
description.spanish: Rechaza la misión y deja la Tierra a su destino.
description.turkish: Misyondan vazgeç ve Dünyayı kaderine bırak.
